page_content:
Directed study with faculty supervision.

Prerequisite: Permission of ARHU-School of Languages, Literatures, and Cultures department.

Restriction: Sophomore standing or higher.

Repeatable to: 9 credits if content differs.

PERS402 Persian Translation (3 Credits)

Focuses on hands-on practice of English/Persian and Persian/English translation as well as the problematic issues of translation. Taught in
